messages: Shining the brass and polishing the woodwork...
Hoisting the sails and checking the rigging...
Swabbing the decks and scrubbing the bilge...
Charting the course and plotting the navigation...
Checking the cannons and loading the ammunition...
Inspecting the lifeboats and safety equipment...
Testing the compass and calibrating the instruments...
Raising the anchor and setting the sails...
Checking the weather and adjusting the sails...
Preparing the galley and provisioning the ship...
Inspecting the hull and checking for leaks...
Checking the rigging and tightening the ropes...
Testing the communication systems and signaling equipment...
Checking the crew's quarters and ensuring everyone is ready...
Running final checks and making sure everything is in order...
